dismissalText.long: c Abhishek Sharma b Shivang Kumar
dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c Abhishek Sharma b Shivang Kumar 29 (29b 4x4 0x6 56m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Straight down long-off's throat. Jaiswal falls for a laborious 29 and SRH are crawling back. Floated outside off, he jumps down the track but gets too close to the pitch of the ball. Ends up skimming it to the right of Abhishek, who runs in and takes a good catch

image.caption: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, player portrait
image.longCaption: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, player portrait

image.caption: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, player portrait
image.longCaption: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, player portrait

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Smaran b Hinge 97 (29b 5x4 12x6 45m) SR: 334.48

dismissalComment.html: Oh noooo, he's picked out the fielder! Praful Hings has the last laugh (or a quiet smile at this point). Pats on the back for Sooryavanshi from the SRH players, as he walks off, castigating himself despite playing one of the most memorable innings you will see. Looks to take on a short ball by slapping it down the ground but miscues it as it lobs up towards deep third, who runs in and completes the catch, ending an all-timer of an innings

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Hinge 50 (21b 5x4 3x6 27m) SR: 238.09

dismissalComment.html: Gets lot of height but not enough distance and Hinge has a second wicket. Pacy back of a length on off stump, Jurel pulls but doesn't generate a lot of power in his shot. The ball goes up and Reddy at deep square leg, completes a good catch

dismissalText.commentary: Donovan Ferreira run out (Shivang Kumar/†Ishan Kishan) 12 (9b 1x4 0x6 27m) SR: 133.33

dismissalComment.html: Ferreira goes for two... surely he is short? Yeah, he is. Fuller outside off, he squirts it to deep backward point where Shivang is slow onto the ball. Ferreira senses a chance and eyes a second, but Shivang's throw is flat and close to the stumps. Ferreira dives but is unable make his ground as Kishan whips off the bails in a flash

dismissalText.long: c Abhishek Sharma b Nitish Kumar Reddy
dismissalText.commentary: Jofra Archer c Abhishek Sharma b Nitish Kumar Reddy 4 (5b 1x4 0x6 3m) SR: 80

dismissalComment.html: Caught right on the boundary and Abhishek has taken a good catch. Or has he? The third umpire has been called to have look. Looked like a clean catch on first instance. Yep, it is. Low full toss on off stump, he gets it right off the cue-end of the bat but only as far as Abhishek at long-on, who catches and on realising he is close to the ropes, lobs the ball up and completes the catch

dismissalText.commentary: Nandre Burger run out (Malinga/†Ishan Kishan) 1 (1b 0x4 0x6 2m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: They are trying for two and Burger is run out. Why would they attempt a second run when the more established batter is at the non-striker's end? That is pretty poor cricket. Slower offcutter outside off, he pats this to deep point where Malinga fires a good throw. Burger is just short when Kishan whips off the bails

dismissalComment.html: Oh Archer you beauty! Knocks Travis Head over, and RR know they are almost there! Archer has been too fast for SRH today. 150kph, and slightly fuller, as Head again backs away, exposing his stumps. The ball crashes into top of off as Head is beaten completely.
